reasoning: 1. TP Dist: 2628.04 (Targeting Value Area Low). 2. SL Dist: 1721.96 (Base 1.8x ATR + Offset for POC overhead supply). 3. TP/SL Ratio: 1.53. 4. Regime: HIGH_VOLATILITY/BEARISH_BREAKOUT. 5. The POC (66128) has transitioned from a support floor to a resistance pivot. The massive volume spike on the Mar 08 20:00 candle confirms aggressive selling pressure that has not been neutralized, suggesting the POC will now act as a ceiling for a move toward the 63.5k range support.
reasoning_zh: 1. TP 距离: 2628.04 (目标价值区低点 VAL)。2. SL 距离: 1721.96 (基准 1.8x ATR + POC 上方供应区偏移)。3. TP/SL 比率: 1.53。4. 市场环境: 高波动/看跌突破。5. 逻辑: 采纳红队审查意见，15分钟周期的楔形结构在高成交量下放量跌破，表明市场结构已转为看跌。POC (66128) 已从支撑位转变为阻力枢轴位。3月8日20:00的大阴线放量显示卖盘极其强劲且尚未被消化，POC 目前已成为上方阻力，预计价格将进一步下探至震荡区间下沿（约 63.5k）。
